title: Section 24
content: 1[24. Grant of medical, dental or nursing degrees, diplomas, etc., by the Institute. -- Notwithstanding anything contained in any other law for the time being in force, 2[every Institute] shall have power to grant medical, dental or nursing degrees, diplomas and other academic distinctions and title under this Act.]
footnote: 1 Subs. by Act 24 of 2002, s. 3, for section 24 (w.e.f. 24-5-2002). 2 Subs. by Act 37 of 2012, s. 22, for "the Institute" (w.e.f. 16-7-2012).
